evidence: Vrijen emphasized that everything he built on Zo was achieved without writing code, pushing the boundaries of what non-technical people can accomplish.
compared Zo favorably to other systems like Magnus, Cursor, and Lovable, noting its unique blend of UI, server, and agentic orchestration.
Eric currently uses Zo for simple tasks: Sunday SMS reminders for inbox look-backs and weekly meeting summaries.
Vrijen detailed his own Zo-built meeting processing system. The system connects directly to the Fireflies API, extracts transcripts, and generates intelligence blocks automatically.
Extended attempt by V to get Fireflies AI to perform a theatrical reading of a poem, but AI consistently refused, citing its design for meeting tasks like action items and bookmarking.
Vrijen shares regret: poised to open second Bitcoin ATM in Chicago but deterred by father's legal warnings about risks and anonymous transactions.
Vrijen reflects on the 'psychotic' energy of high-net-worth social circles in Cambridge, mentioning friends like Lizzie (retired at 41 from crypto) and Rachel.
